goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'park'.
Make sure you get 'phone number', 'postcode', and 'area'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should leave on 'friday' and should 'arrive by 13:30'.
The train should go to 'birmingham new street' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'departure time'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of park
Make sure you get phone number, postcode, and area
You are also looking for a train. The train should leave on friday and should arrive by 13:30
The train should go to birmingham new street and should depart from cambridge
Make sure you get departure time
